sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106303" key="u(datoplh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτο-πλήξ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλῆγος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n106303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beaten by the waters,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄκρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.142</biblScope></bibl></cit>, in poet. dat. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πλήγεσιν <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
